race.comment: ONLY US (5) made it a hat-trick last start when winning over this track and trip last time out, scoring in this company as an odds-on pop. He won easily there and doesn't change in weight coming into this race. Looks to have found his niche with the Hammarquist stable and he can keep his winning streak alive. MANAVENDRA (1) will carry the big weight today but deservedly so as he drops right back in grade. He's been outclassed in recent efforts in Saturday grade and has been moved to the Dellar stable. Should appreciate the easier company this time around and he can bounce back to form. LET'S SEA (4) came from well back on the bend to score last time out over 1400m at this track. Likely to feature. DEAL OBTAINED (8) performed above expectations last time over 1200m at this track, getting the prize by a long neck. In the mix again. URBAN WARRIOR (9) is better than he showed last start and won't be far away.
